description_long: This kiosk is a compact, modular booth structure with three solid side and rear walls and an open front. The interior features two black chairs and a white rectangular table, set on a red floor. Above the entrance, a red fascia panel displays space for signage, and a printed banner with a logo and stall information is mounted on the back wall. The frame appears to be constructed from metallic or aluminum tubing, giving it a modern, utilitarian look. The roof is flat and partially covered, with a prominent overhanging fascia for branding. The overall design is functional, suitable for temporary installations at expos, fairs, or urban events.
description: A modern, modular kiosk booth with solid side and rear walls, open front, and a prominent red fascia for signage. Interior includes two chairs and a table on a red floor, with a flat roof and metallic frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open entrance, red fascia signage, interior chairs, table, and back wall banner.
description_view_1: Rear angled view showing the solid back and side walls, with no visible signage or entry.
description_view_2: Direct rear view highlighting the plain, solid back wall and the flat roof structure.
description_view_3: Side-rear view showing the solid side and back walls, and partial view of the metallic frame.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and banner; red fascia panel above entrance with placeholder text, and a printed banner with logo and stall info on the back wall.
attribute_door_configuration: Single open entryway at the front, no physical door.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with partial coverage, metallic frame, and overhanging fascia panel for signage.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern utilitarian with modular, minimalist influences.
